creator: andrnils@gmail.com
text:
After applying patch and trying to build there are a few patches that fails to apply.


=> FreeBSD patch patch-0e03784e.c failed to apply cleanly.
=> FreeBSD patch patch-4e3ea4b8.c failed to apply cleanly.
=> FreeBSD patch patch-61f3e385.c failed to apply cleanly.
=> FreeBSD patch patch-ef9b7e88.c failed to apply cleanly.
=> FreeBSD patch patch-f8b41205.c failed to apply cleanly.


Prefixing those files with no- the rest of the patches applies.

Apart from the patches libinput-1.12.4 works well. I noticed an increase in the speed/sensitivity of the touchpad.
